recommendations.title: Sissy
recommendations.overview: Cecilia is a successful social media influencer living the dream, until she runs into her ex-childhood best friend and is invited away on her bachelorette weekend. Suddenly, Sissy finds herself stuck in a remote cabin with her school bully... and a t

recommendations.title: Whisper
recommendations.overview: Sinister things begin happening to kidnappers who are holding a young boy for ransom in a remote cabin.

recommendations.title: The Cabin in the Woods
recommendations.overview: Five friends set out for a weekend at a remote cabin in the woods, expecting nothing more than fun and relaxation. As night falls, they discover that something far more unsettling is at work and that nothing about their getaway is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Dead Snow
recommendations.overview: Eight medical students on a ski trip to Norway discover that Hitler's horrors live on when they come face to face with a battalion of zombie Nazi soldiers intent on devouring anyone unfortunate enough to wander into the remote mountains where they we

recommendations.title: The Scary House
recommendations.overview: When a big-city family moves to a remote town, two young brothers and their new friends try to solve the menacing mystery that haunts their home.

recommendations.title: The Astronomer's Dream
recommendations.overview: An astronomer has a terrifying dream.

recommendations.title: Cabin Fever
recommendations.overview: While staying at a remote cabin for a week-long vacation, a group of five college friends succumb to an infectious, flesh-eating disease.

recommendations.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
recommendations.overview: A doctor's research into the roots of evil turns him into a hideous depraved fiend.

recommendations.title: The Devil Below
recommendations.overview: A group of four amateur adventurers who specialize in exploring remote and forsaken places pay a visit to Shookum Hills, a town in the remote Appalachian Mountains which was abandoned decades ago due to a mysterious coal mine fire.

recommendations.title: The First Temptation of Christ
recommendations.overview: Jesus, who's hitting the big 3-0, brings a surprise guest to meet the family. A Christmas special so wrong it must be from comedians Porta dos Fundos.
